## 📋 Draft Pick Review

### ❌ CANCELLED — Atlanta Hawks ML (Draft ID: nba_draft_20260314_001)
- **Reason:** Game already tipped off at 19:00Z; commit time is 19:46Z (~46 minutes into game). Pre-game bet cannot be placed on an in-progress game. Despite the Hawks holding the strongest form signal on the slate (L10: 9-1) and no anchor injuries, standard pre-game betting rules require cancellation. This is a simulation scheduling anomaly — the draft pick was also created at 19:14Z, after tip-off.
- **No injury concerns:** Trae Young and Dejounte Murray both healthy.
- **Line movement:** No adverse movement detected.

---

### ✅ CONFIRMED — Miami Heat ML (Bet ID: nba_bet_20260314_001)
- **Match:** Miami Heat vs Orlando Magic  
- **Time:** 2026-03-15T00:00:00Z (~4h14m from now)  
- **Odds:** 1.88 | **Stake:** €150 | **Potential Return:** €282.00  
- **Confidence:** 60 (Medium)  
- **Anchor Status:** Bam Adebayo ✅ Active | Tyler Herro ✅ Active  
- **Line Movement:** No adverse movement detected  
- **Edge Summary:** Both teams L10: 8-2 — genuine mirror matchup. Home court at Kaseya Center is the decisive tiebreaker in an evenly-matched game. Heat home culture and playoff motivation confirmed edge. Confidence deliberately capped at 60 — Magic are genuinely capable of winning. At 1.88, value is present for a home team in a high-motivation spot.
- **Cancel Criteria Check:** None triggered ✅

---

### ✅ CONFIRMED — LA Clippers ML (Bet ID: nba_bet_20260314_002)
- **Match:** LA Clippers vs Sacramento Kings  
- **Time:** 2026-03-15T02:30:00Z (~6h44m from now)  
- **Odds:** 1.72 | **Stake:** €150 | **Potential Return:** €258.00  
- **Confidence:** 65 (Medium-High)  
- **Anchor Status:** Kawhi Leonard ✅ Active | James Harden ✅ Active  
- **Line Movement:** No adverse movement detected  
- **Edge Summary:** Sacramento Kings confirmed tank team (16-51, worst record in West). Skills file explicitly identifies betting against tanking teams as edge-positive. Clippers are home (L10: 7-3) with clear play-in/playoff motivation. Motivation delta is the largest available on tonight's slate. Conditional odds threshold (≥1.70) confirmed at 1.72. 
- **Cancel Criteria Check:** None triggered ✅

pending_bets.reasoning: Mirror-image matchup (both L10: 8-2) where home court advantage is the decisive tiebreaker. Heat at Kaseya Center with playoff/play-in motivation. Heat culture well-documented for strong home performances. Anchors Bam Adebayo and Tyler Herro both active. Odds 1.88 within 1.70–2.50 target range. No cancel criteria triggered. Confidence capped at 60 (medium) due to genuinely even matchup — Magic equally capable — but home edge justifies the play at these odds.

Kings are a confirmed tanking team (16-51 record, worst in West, L10: 4-6, own their 2026 draft pick) — skills explicitly state betting against tanking teams is edge-positive. Clippers are home (L10: 7-3) with strong play-in/postseason motivation. Motivation delta is the largest on tonight's slate: Clippers fighting for their playoff lives vs Kings actively seeking lottery position. Anchors Kawhi Leonard and James Harden both active. Odds confirmed at 1.72, meeting the ≥1.70 conditional threshold set at draft. No cancel criteria triggered.
